name: agentmail
description: Local peer mailbox for Codex and Claude Code collaboration.

interface.shortDescription: Coordinate peer coding agents through a local mailbox
interface.longDescription: AgentMail gives Codex and Claude Code a shared local mailbox with message status, thread history, artifacts, and file-scope claims while preserving free-form message bodies.
defaultPrompt: Use AgentMail to join the current collaboration room as codex.
After joining, list peers, check the codex inbox, and summarize any unread messages.
When collaborating with Claude Code, send natural-language messages in body, preserve peer content exactly, and use scope claims before editing files that both agents may touch.
